phrases.intent_en: Ask where the foot care section is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la sección de cuidado de pies?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿DOHN-deh es-TAH lah sek-SYOHN deh kwee-DAH-doh deh PYEHS?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, pasillo tres, estante inferior.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh pah-SEEL-loh TREHS eh-STAHN-teh een-feh-ree-OHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, aisle three, bottom shelf.

responses.english: At the back, aisle three, bottom shelf.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh pah-SEEL-loh TREHS eh-STAHN-teh een-feh-ree-OHR
responses.local: Al fondo, pasillo tres, estante inferior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which Compeed size fits heels
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué tamaño de Compeed sirve para talones?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, keh tah-MAH-nyoh deh kom-PEED SEER-veh PAH-rah tah-LOH-nes?

likely_response.local: Use el tamaño pequeño específico para talones.
likely_response.pronunciation: OO-seh EHL tah-MAH-nyoh peh-k-EH-nyoh eh-speh-THÍ-fee-koh PAH-rah tah-LOH-nehs
likely_response.translation_en: Use the small size specific for heels.

responses.english: Use the small size specific for heels.
responses.phonetic: OO-seh EHL tah-MAH-nyoh peh-k-EH-nyoh eh-speh-THÍ-fee-koh PAH-rah tah-LOH-nehs
responses.local: Use el tamaño pequeño específico para talones.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if muscle rub samples are available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen muestras gratuitas de crema muscular?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, TYEH-nen MWEHS-trahs grah-TOO-ee-tahs deh KREH-mah moos-koo-LAHR?

likely_response.translation_en: No, we only sell full tubes.

responses.english: No, we only sell full tubes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the pharmacist consultation counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está el mostrador del farmacéutico?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh eh-STAH el mos-trah-DOR del far-mah-SEW-tee-koh?

likely_response.translation_en: At the back, on the right.

responses.english: At the back, on the right.
